name: Freee
description: Japans cloud accounting, payroll and invoicing platform with open APIs for JP tax compliance (consumption tax, e-invoice).

seo.title: Freee — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Freee: Japans cloud accounting, payroll and invoicing platform with open APIs for JP tax compliance (consumption tax, e-invoice).

when_to_use: Japan consumption tax and e-invoice (JP PINT) compliance via REST API
Cloud accounting and payroll automation for Japanese SMBs
Invoice and expense management integrated with Japanese bookkeeping standards
Qualified Invoice registration and issuing compliance for Japanese business

pros: End-to-end JP accounting, payroll and invoicing
Compliant with JP consumption tax and e-invoice
cons: Built for Japan — no international coverage
Some advanced features require higher tiers
API rate limits require careful planning
Payroll module has a learning curve
review.verdict: The go-to cloud accounting platform for Japanese SMBs, with one of the better APIs in JP SaaS.
review.best_for: Japanese startups and SMBs wanting unified accounting, payroll and invoicing with API access.
review.not_for: Companies operating outside Japan or needing multi-country consolidation.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
